posts.text: 3D printing has already been used to make biological tissues for transplant without the need for human or animal donors. Adding circuits could allow them to monitor a patient in real time https://www.economist.com/science-and-technology/2026/06/24/electronics-can-now-be-printed-onto-living-tissues?taid=6a3e9d57205767000100c089&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: President Trump accuses Iran of a "foolish violation" of the US-Iran ceasefire agreement after Iran shot at least four one-way attack drones at ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Said it a year ago but will say it again… The easy money is made by correctly predicting future events that will re-rate a company. EPA, Gas Plant, Major Contracts, FDA food grade plastic, US military deal, USA GEIC, Nasdaq, more patents Are the catalyst events and nothings changed in my mind other than things have taken longer than expected. But, we’ve seen significant market cap growth just from EPA, (and EU Reach, UK approvals), Masterbatch compounding partners, more patents. We have been told that Gas Plant formally announced should be soon and it’s a multi decade agreement involving land and permits. But it’s now apparently ‘very soon’ based on company presentations. It’s said to be with a major and will give them the ability to grow and virtually unlimited graphene production capacity. Nasdaq filings are on going it seems and prep is for the fall… FDA food grade plastics will be absolutely huge. It will come but we just don’t know when. But the science is sound. Contracts are said to be progressing. They are delivering profound results with their clients. Multiple projects with the military and US GEIC being prepared for congressional budget approvals. You either believe these things will happen and the stock will go a lot higher or you don’t. I believe they will and ya. It’s frustrating waiting. But I think it’s worth the wait. Judging by the massive amount of people bugging me for insights today I would say interest is there to buy the dip for some, others just want an update but the volatility has people’s attention. Just like it does at peaks. So, hopefully we put a bottom in here and get some news and momentum going back up.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
